url.title: Mobile.de vehicle URL
url.description: Single vehicle ad URL to scrape.

proxyCountry.title: Proxy country
proxyCountry.description: Optional ISO country code for Apify Proxy, e.g. DE.

proxySessionId.title: Proxy session ID
proxySessionId.description: Optional fixed session ID to keep one IP/session during retries.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max request retries
maxRequestRetries.description: How many retries to do if Mobile.de blocks a request.
